visual_note: Warm parchment-tan with a faint field tint. Should feel like the unwashed map base plus sparse grass marks.
Muted moss green. Distinct from Grasslands but still restrained and survey-map compatible.
Soft lavender-grey heather. Atmospheric without becoming bright purple.
Muted blue-grey. Needs to read clearly as a mechanical river barrier while staying archival.
Cool grey-blue ridge tone. Low survey-ridge feel, not dramatic fantasy peaks.
Soft wheat ochre. Should read as tilled or cultivated land without harsh yellow.
Warm grey-brown rubble tone. Compatible with low foundations, broken stone, and old civic remnants.
